questions.question: Describe the key difference between a software engineer and a programmer. Provide examples for each role and justify your answer.
questions.hint: Focus on the skills, responsibilities, and mindset of each role

questions.question: Explain the concept of modularity in software engineering. Provide an example of a real-world software system that demonstrates modularity.
questions.hint: Focus on the benefits of modularity and how it improves software maintainability

questions.question: What is the 'three-stage model' of the software engineering process? Describe each stage in detail, including the tasks involved, inputs, and outputs. Provide an example of a software project that demonstrates each stage.
questions.hint: Focus on the iterative nature of the software engineering process and how each stage builds upon the previous one
